#  Submittal Builder: Generate Submittals from Specifications 
##  Background 
The Submittal Builder allows you to automatically create the submittal registry from the specification book. 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * Only vector PDF spec sections can be used to generate a submittal registry.
  * All submittals related to this specification section must appear under a header that contains the English word, "Submittals."
  * The Submittal Builder is only available in English in the United States, Canada, and Australia.​​​
    * An [AI-powered Submittal Builder ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/submittal-builder-with-ai-generate-submittals-from-specifications)is available in English to _Enhanced_ and _Premier_ Procore accounts in the United States, Canada, and Australia.


##  Prerequisites 
  * There must be specifications in the Specifications tool. See [Upload Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/upload-specifications).
  * The specification sections you want to upload must be [vector PDFs.](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-raster-and-vector-content-in-pdfs)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Mark the checkboxes next to the specifications from which you want to create submittals.
  3. Click **Generate Submittals.  
**_Note:_ Specifications that already processed for submittals are not selectable a second time.
  4. Click **Review.**


##### Review New Submittals
![Review](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7KTDgqnGTCpV2fmPxGzJQn/9266f07cfae90ffab3d082e95fc34d7a/review.png?fm=webp)
  1. Click a spec section in the list of selected sections on the left.
  2. If needed, **view** the spec section PDF to help you build submittals. Opening the spec section PDF will not disrupt your work in the Submittal Builder.  
_Note_ : View the spec section to easily add additional submittals to the submittal builder by [Highlighting to add Submittals to the Submittal Builder](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/submittal-builder-add-submittals).
  3. Procore will attempt to fill the **Type** and **Description** fields. Review these fields before adding or configuring the submittal titles.
  4. Add a **Title** for each submittal.  
OR  
Select **Configure Title** to automate submittal titles for the submittals in all spec sections or in the current spec section. See [Submittal Builder: Configure Submittal Titles](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/submittal-builder-configure-submittal-titles).
  5. Add any submittals by clicking the **Add** button. See [Submittal Builder: Add Submittals](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/submittal-builder-add-submittals).
  6. Click the **Duplicate** button to create an additional submittal with the title, type, and description of the one you're duplicating.  
Click the **Delete** icon to delete the selected submittal.
  7. Add or edit the **Submittal Manager** per spec section. By default, Procore will populate this field with the default submittal manager set in the [Submittal Configurations page](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/configure-settings-submittals-tool). See [What is the submittal manager role?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-submittal-manager-role)
  8. Once you've added all of the information you need for this spec section (the Submittal Manager field is required), click **Confirm** to create submittals based off of this spec section.


Repeat these steps until you have reviewed all of the new submittals.
##  Next Steps 
  1. Fill out the remaining information on your submittals.
     * Create and edit submittal packages (recommended). See [Create a Submittal Package](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/create-a-submittal-package) and [Bulk Edit Submittals in a Package](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/bulk-edit-submittals).  
OR
     * Bulk edit the submittals. See [Use Bulk Actions > Edit in the Submittals Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/use-bulk-actions-edit-in-the-submittals-tool).


## See Also
  * [Submittal Builder with AI: Generate Submittals from Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/submittal-builder-with-ai-generate-submittals-from-specifications)
  * [Submittal Builder: Configure Submittal Titles](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/submittal-builder-configure-submittal-titles)
  * [Submittal Builder: Add Submittals](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/submittal-builder-add-submittals)
title: Submittal Builder: Generate Submittals from Specifications
description: How to automatically generate your submittal log from specifications in your Specifications tool.
